summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI Dependency Scanner. Backend APIs fully functional (5/5 tests passed). Frontend UI working correctly with all features: form submission, loading states, results display with 3 tabs (Overview with charts, Files with filters, Raw Data), search filter, framework filter, and accordion expansion. Tested with real GitHub repository (openai/openai-python) - successfully scanned 100 files and detected 244 LLM framework occurrences across 2 frameworks (openai, rag_generic).

design_issues.issue: Background gradient not rendering - code has 'bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-slate-100' but displays as solid color rgb(250, 250, 250)
design_issues.note: Gradient is very subtle (slate-50 to slate-100) so may be rendering but barely visible. Not a functional issue.

design_issues.issue: No footer element present on the page
design_issues.note: Footer may not be required for this minimal design

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/health)
Backend pattern configuration endpoint (GET /api/config/patterns) - 7 frameworks configured
Backend invalid URL validation (POST /api/scans with non-GitHub URL returns 400)
Backend repository scanning (POST /api/scans) - successfully scanned openai/openai-python repo
Backend scan retrieval (GET /api/scans/{scan_id}) - retrieved scan with 100 files, 244 occurrences
Backend non-existent scan handling (GET /api/scans/invalid-id returns 404)
Frontend page load and initial render
Frontend form elements (URL input, scan button) with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend form submission and button state management
Frontend loading state display during scan
Frontend results display with correct stats (100 files, 244 matches, 2 frameworks, 2.4 avg)
Frontend scan status badge (SUCCESS)
Frontend tab navigation (Overview, Files, Raw Data tabs)
Frontend Overview tab - Detected Frameworks badges (openai, rag_generic)
Frontend Overview tab - Occurrences by Framework bar chart rendering
Frontend Overview tab - Files by Framework pie chart rendering
Frontend Overview tab - Top Files by Matches table
Frontend Files tab - file list with 100 accordion items
Frontend Files tab - search filter (reduced 100 files to 2 when searching 'async')
Frontend Files tab - search clear functionality (restored to 100 files)
Frontend Files tab - framework filter dropdown
Frontend Files tab - combined search + framework filters (28 files with 'example' + 'openai')
Frontend Files tab - filtered stats display ('Showing X files • Y occurrences')
Frontend Files tab - accordion expansion showing occurrence details (line number, framework, pattern name, code snippet)
Frontend Raw Data tab - JSON display with 64,053 characters
Frontend toast notifications (success message on scan completion)
Frontend responsive design and spacing
Frontend button contrast and accessibility
Frontend font rendering (Inter font family)
